final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: cinematic-illustration
Asset type: fantasy book cover, epic battle scene
Primary request: dragon breathing fire at a charging knight with shield, dynamic action pose
Scene/backdrop: burning castle ruins, lightning storm sky, embers and smoke filling the air
Subject: massive scaled dragon with spread wings and open jaws spewing orange flames; armored knight in full plate mail with raised shield and sword, mid-charge
Style/medium: digital fantasy illustration, painterly style with dramatic brushwork
Composition/framing: wide epic shot, low angle looking up at the clash, rule of thirds with dragon and knight as dual focal points
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro, fire glow illuminating the scene, lightning flashes creating harsh highlights, intense and heroic atmosphere
Color palette: deep storm grays and purples, fiery oranges and reds, metallic silver armor accents, ember sparks
Materials/textures: rough dragon scales, polished steel armor, cracked stone castle walls, billowing smoke
Constraints: maintain clear silhouettes for both dragon and knight, emphasize motion and impact
Avoid: flat lighting, cartoonish proportions, cluttered composition, watermark
